name: cb-get-file-from-endpoint

outputs.description: The command Status ('pending', 'in progress', 'complete', 'error', 'canceled'). CbLiveResponse.Commands.CommandCompletionTime The command completion time (0 if not complete).
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.Status

outputs.description: The source path of the file. CbLiveResponse.Commands.FileID Unique file ID.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.OperandObject

outputs.description: File MD5 hash CbLiveResponse.File.Extension File extension.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.File.MD5

source_title: VMware Carbon Black EDR (Live Response API)
